rationale: Franses (2005) is cited in core argumentative sections, not just as a generic background reference. In the introduction, it is used to justify the need for policy-simulation-oriented marketing models, and in the model formulation it is linked to the Lucas-critique requirement for structural credibility. The conclusion also states that the paper seeks to fill the void identified by Franses, indicating this citation materially informs framing and claimed contribution.
relation_description: The citing paper treats Franses (2005) as methodological groundwork for conducting credible policy simulations in marketing. It builds its study rationale and model design around those principles and presents its PC channel analysis as addressing the gap Franses highlighted.
